answer:
Ahrefs does not offer a free-tier plan for its API. Access to the Ahrefs API is restricted to eligible paid subscription plans [1][2].

While there is no free tier, all users have access to limited free test queries to facilitate development and testing [1][2]. These queries allow you to test API endpoints without consuming paid API units, provided the requests use specific domains (such as ahrefs.com) or keywords as targets [3]. To use these test queries, you must still generate an API key via your workspace account settings [1][3]. Full production access, including higher row limits and broader data access, requires an active paid subscription [1][4].
